title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Freshworks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
